title: 3 Transport-Services Stocks to Watch Despite Industry Woes
text: Inflation and the related economic uncertainty are hurting the Zacks Transportation-Services industry's prospects. However, stocks like EXPD, CHRW and MATX appear better positioned to escape the industry challenges.

title: This Dividend King Looks Deeply Undervalued
text: According to the GuruFocus sector performance chart, the Industrial sector has fallen more than 23% since the start of the year, which is even worse than the return for the S&P 500 Index.
